A perfect place to relax during your trip; eat and drink, and rest in the wooded park.

reviews.comment:
Es un parador que está en la mano a Buenos Aires. Tiene una amplia zona de descanso con estacionamiento y árboles como para estirar las piernas. Los baños están bastante limpios para la cantidad de gente qué pasa por el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
It's a beach bar right on the doorstep of Buenos Aires. It has a large rest area with parking and trees to stretch your legs. The restrooms are quite clean considering the number of people who pass through.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5c1ltamRnEAE

reviews.comment:
La gran diferencia de esta estación es el amplio lugar verde que tiene, y los espacios con mesas para parar a almorzar, tomar mate, hacer un recreo sumado que es ideal para parar con mascotas como en mi caso. No puedo opinar de los servicios de la estación en si porque soy usuario de Shell y nunca cargo en YPF por la baja calidad en los combustibles. El show es cómo el resto, está bien en general y tienen variedad de comidas rápidas.

(Translated by Google)
The biggest difference at this station is its large green area and the picnic tables where you can stop for lunch, drink mate, or take a break. It's also ideal for stopping with pets, as I did. I can't comment on the station's services themselves because I'm a Shell customer and never fill up at YPF due to the low quality of their fuel. The entertainment is like the rest of the stations; it's generally okay, and they have a variety of fast food options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MFlLNEJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada al regresar de la costa. Excelente servicio e higiene. El espacio al aire libre es fenomenal.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way back from the coast. Excellent service and cleanliness. The outdoor space is fantastic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MFl5THp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
A diferencia de cualquier YPF, esta cuenta con espacios verdes, arboledas, mesas como para poder para a comer algo rápido, ya sea comprando en el Shop o con comida que uno lleve. También es una buena opción par hacer un alto con mascotas colo en mi caso, por el verde y los espacios que tiene.

(Translated by Google)
Unlike other YPF stations, this one has green spaces, groves of trees, and tables where you can stop for a quick bite, whether you buy something at the shop or bring your own food. It's also a good option for taking a break with pets, as I did, because of the greenery and the spacious area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MGRUOUdREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5MFpEalV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un lugar tranquilo,limpio y al aire libre para hacer una parada y descansar de la ruta los precios son como todas la estaciones de servicio de las rutas no baratos, pero si tienen  Serviclub o Aca aveces tienen alguna promoción.

(Translated by Google)
A quiet, clean, open-air place to stop and rest from the route. The prices are, like all service stations along the routes, not cheap, but if they have Serviclub or Aca, they sometimes have a promotion.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5a2JmMUV3EAE
